ballot_measures.number: Board of Regents Nominating Committees Amendment
ballot_measures.title: Board of Regents Nominating Committees Amendment
ballot_measures.description: Make changes to the Board of Regents, including establishing nominating committees to provide lists of candidates and prohibit non-student members from changing political party 12 months preceding appointment

ballot_measures.number: Eliminate Governor's Pocket Veto and Require Veto Explanations Amendment
ballot_measures.title: Eliminate Governor's Pocket Veto and Require Veto Explanations Amendment
ballot_measures.description: Require bills to become law if the governor does not sign or veto them within the required timeframe, eliminating the governor's pocket veto. This legislatively referred constitutional amendment is on the New Mexico 2026 ballot.

ballot_measures.number: Establish Salary for State Legislators Amendment
ballot_measures.title: Establish Salary for State Legislators Amendment
ballot_measures.description: Establish a salary for state legislators equal to the annual median household income of the state

ballot_measures.number: Repeal Separate Election Requirement for School Election Dates Amendment
ballot_measures.title: Repeal Separate Election Requirement for School Election Dates Amendment
ballot_measures.description: Repeal the constitutional provision requiring that school elections be held at different times from partisan elections
